com.mentor.chs.api.report

Interface IXReportTemplate


  • public interface IXReportTemplate
    A report template has a resultexpression which is a formula that decides the content(string) to be shown for entity types queried for in a report module. The resultexpression is run for each entity of the query result and the returned value is included in the report. In a tabular report, the report template decides the content that goes into a single column of the table.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      int getEvaluationScopeIndex()
      The expression in a report template applies typically to a single query result ( i.e a single IXObject).

      Returns the resultexpression for the report template.
      java.lang.String getTitle()
      returns the title for the report template

        get custom attribute value for the given attribute name.
        Parameters:
        attributeName - -- custom attribute name whose value is sought
        Returns:
        custom attribute value corresponding to attributeName.

      • getEvaluationScopeIndex

        int getEvaluationScopeIndex()
        The expression in a report template applies typically to a single query result ( i.e a single IXObject). However, it is possible to change the scope to groups of results obtained from queries in a reportmodule. These groups could be the natural groups a) collection of all results from queries in this module treated as a single group b) individual results from queries in this module treated as single element groups.(typically the case ) or groups generated using grouping expressions in this module( see addGroupingResultExpression) To identify which groups of results a expression applies, an evaluation index could be set. The following could be evaluation scope index values 0 -- expression is to be applied on a collection of all query results from this module. 1 -- expression is to be applied on a collection of query results sharing the same value obtained from evaluating the last grouping result expression. 2 -- on a collection of entities (already grouped using first grouping expression) sharing the same value obtained from evaluating the the second last grouping result expression

        and so on 0xffffff (a very large integer value)- expression is to applied on each query result returned by parent module( this is the default) To handle groups of result set in this template, it is required that the IXGroupResultExpression interface be implemented by the expression.

        Returns:
        integer value that defines the evaluation scope.
        See Also:
        IXGroupResultExpression.startGroupEvaluation(), IXGroupResultExpression.endGroupEvaluation(), IXReportModule.addGroupingExpression(com.mentor.chs.api.query.IXResultExpression)
